title: First sharing point
description: The first Foodsharing point opens in Tartu, bringing the German model to Estonia.

title: Growing the network
description: New locations added across the city, reaching more neighbourhoods and partnering with local businesses.

title: Refrigerated points
description: Several points upgraded with refrigerators, allowing fresh and dairy products to be shared safely.

title: Community milestone
description: Thousands of kilograms of food rescued. The volunteer base grows and public awareness increases.

title: 9 000 kg rescued
description: Over 9 000 kg of food saved from the bin. Five active points now operate across Tartu with 30+ volunteers.
